mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trade_pool_report (symbol, name, score, reason, summary, analysis_json, batch_id, created_at) VALUES (#{symbol}, #{name}, #{score}, #{reason}, #{summary}, #{analysisJson}, #{batchId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, symbol, name, score, reason, summary, analysis_json, batch_id, created_at FROM trade_pool_report WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, symbol, name, score, reason, summary, analysis_json, batch_id, created_at FROM trade_pool_report WHERE symbol = #{symbol} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
